name: agentcourses
description: agentCourses exists to quantify how harness engineering, agentic coding harnesses, and model selection affect software quality and delivery efficiency. A dark software factory scaffold where coding agents build in isolated worktrees with exhaustive automated quality, architecture, security, and BDD gates.
author: agentCourses

scripts.dev: pnpm proxy:stop && pnpm proxy:start && turbo watch dev --filter='./apps/*' --filter='./packages/*'
scripts.dev:worktree: WORKTREE_NAME=$(basename $PWD) pnpm proxy:ensure && WORKTREE_NAME=$(basename $PWD) turbo watch dev:worktree --filter='./apps/*' --filter='./packages/*'
scripts.proxy:stop: pnpm exec portless proxy stop || true
scripts.proxy:start: pnpm exec portless proxy start --https -p 1355 || true
scripts.proxy:ensure: pnpm exec portless proxy start --https -p 1355 || true
scripts.clean: turbo run clean && rimraf dist node_modules **/coverage .turbo
scripts.audit: pnpm audit --audit-level=high --prod || true; pnpm audit --audit-level=critical --dev || true
scripts.verify: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run analyze && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test:arch && pnpm run test:acceptance && pnpm run knip && pnpm run audit && pnpm run snyk || true
